name: Shtekerito el Bulbonito
lore:
Lore of Shtekerito el Bulbonito
                                    


An Indonesian brainrot inspired by Garamararambraramanmararaman dan Madudungdung tak tuntung perkuntung.
Lyrics
Original (Indonesian)
Shtekerito el Bulbonito, e stekereti el bulboneti. A pakunya bohlampu dan kolokan di lampasa jam segini. Kalo mereka melakukan sesuatu, yang mereka la kukana da lahmen kolokannya kanak pasa hari minggu pukul empat pagi. Mereka tidak punya hiburan lain, mereka majang kotoran sapi. Bayang k...
Translated (English)
Shtekerito el Bulbonito, the nails are hammered into the bulb. The lamp is lit and the clock is wound. When they wake up, they don't wake up and they don't wake up their children on Sunday at four in the morning. They have no other entertainment, they just watch the cows. Imagine...
